calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Martin Hoffman, Esq., appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Ferd Stoer, a/k/a Ferdinand T. Stoer.
Default was entered against defendant on July 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 1, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ferd Stoer, a/k/a Ferdinand T. Stoer, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $78,965.73.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,637.23.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $549.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $86,151.96.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Continued To Aug-02-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Continued To Apr-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
